login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.sessionReplaced: Your account was opened on another device, so this session was closed. Please sign in again to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.successMessage: Check your email. A password reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.linkValidity: The link is valid for 24 hours.

deviceVerify.verifiedDesc: You won't receive warning emails for future logins from this device.
deviceVerify.linkExpiredHint: The link may have expired (24 hours). Sign in again to trigger a new verification email.

twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoveryDescription: Save these codes in a safe place. Each can only be used once.

errors.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.

verifyEmail.checkInboxDesc: We sent you a verification link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.checkInboxDescWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.checkSpam: If you can't find the email, check your spam/junk folder.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Could not send the link. Please try again.
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your account is active. Redirecting you to choose your exam interests.
verifyEmail.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid. You can request a new one.
verifyEmail.tokenExpired: The link has expired. You can request a new verification link.
